creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245577
git diff with more debug output

(In reply to Patrick M. Hausen from comment #14)
Hi. Thanks for the screenshots. As noted in another comment they do not provide the details needed to debug this.

If it is not possible to create a DEBUG kernel or some other way to get a core dump would you be able to try this patch for some extra information during the boot?
